TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Frank Caprio miliclicay == Frank Caprio (1936 miheca 11 folad 23 romi'ad – 2025 miheca 8 folad 20 romi'ad), I'ayaw o nano miliclicay no hoing i Providence niyaro' i Rhode kanatal no Amilika, no Rhode kanatal takaraway kiwiko licikay kakeridan (Rhode Island Board of Governors for Higher Education). O piliclic no tayal ningra masyasin palakamok, sarakat i WLNE-TV mapasadak, ikor itira to i Fox pahosoay kosi no niyaro'ay tilifi mapasadak. Ka'oripan Ci Caprio malakakeridan no Rhode kanatal takaraway kiwiko licikay kakeridan (Rhode Island Board of Governors for Higher Education) , mikantok to salaloma'an no sakowan a patirengan kakkoyin ato daykako to mihecaan 600 'ofad US payso a yosang ato ta'akay nitelekan a demak. ira ko kinatoloay mapatoro' to saka citodong kakeridan no Rhode kanatal. O nano sa'ayaway ato tenokay pitilidan kiwiko kikingkay no Rhode kanatal (Rhode Island Board of Regents for Elementary and Secondary Education) todong a tayal. Ci Caprio kinapinapina maala dayhiw no Mincutang polong no kitakit, mapatoro' citodong i 1970 miheca kakeridan no hoing no Rhode kanatal, ato 1978 miheca Providence siciw Mincutang milifetay I 2023 miheca 1 folad misawad ko tayal, citodong to Providencesi laocan patirengan cinganganay miliclicay tayal. I 2023 miheca 12 folad 6 romi'ad, ci Caprio itira i youtube pasadak to filomo to kaciadada to tapling a kang adada . 2025 miheca 8 folad 19 romi'ad, ni Caprio a mitiya pasadak to ratoh, o nika ciadada ni Caprio milafin i isingan. Saka 2 romi'ad, sanga'ay sa ko piliyas to hekal a mapatay, 88 mihecaan ko 'orip . Tekedan 'orip Kasofocan ni Caprio o mafolaway no Itali laloma'an , o fafahi ningra ci Joyce Caprio . Lalima ko wawa nangra, halo 'ayaway cucicang no Rhode kanatal ci Frank T. Caprio, ato Kararemay pikaykian iing ato kakeridan no Mincutang i Rhode kanatal ci David Caprio. Kafafalican demak Ci Caprio itini i niyaro'ay a kamok Caught in Providence malatadamaanay, tonini a kamok awaayay ko calay a tilifi WLNE-TV ato i Providence kanatal ci calayay tilifi maparatoh, ini Caprio i niyaro'ay hoing caay ka saiten ko piliclic a demak mapasadak . Pinengnengan tilid
S.PHON: == frank ʦaprio~u miɾiʦɾiʦaj == frank ʦaprio~u (**** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), iʡajaw o~u nano~u miɾiʦɾiʦaj no~u ħo~uiŋ i pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə nijaro~uʡ i rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ no~u amiɾika, no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ takarawaj kiwiko~u ɾiʦikaj kakəriɬ~ɮan (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf *o~ub~vərno~urs fo~ur ħi*ħər əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un). o~u piɾiʦɾiʦ no~u tajaɾ niŋra masjasin paɾakamo~uk, sarakat i wɾnə-tb~v mapasaɬ~ɮak, iko~ur itira to~u i fo~ux paħo~uso~uaj ko~usi no~u nijaro~uʡaj tiɾifi mapasaɬ~ɮak. kaʡo~uripan ʦi ʦaprio~u maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ takarawaj kiwiko~u ɾiʦikaj kakəriɬ~ɮan (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf *o~ub~vərno~urs fo~ur ħi*ħər əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un) , mikanto~uk to~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u sako~uwan a patirəŋan kakko~ujin ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u miħəʦaan *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ o~u~us pajso~u a jo~usaŋ ato~u taʡakaj nitəɾəkan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u kinato~uɾo~uaj mapato~uro~uʡ to~u saka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ. o~u nano~u saʡajawaj ato~u təno~ukaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan kiwiko~u kikiŋkaj no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf rə*ənts fo~ur əɾəməntarj anɬ~ɮ səʦo~unɬ~ɮarj əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un) to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a tajaɾ. ʦi ʦaprio~u kinapinapina maaɾa ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u minʦo~u~utaŋ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit, mapato~uro~uʡ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ħo~uiŋ no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ, ato~u **** miħəʦa pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə siʦiw minʦo~u~utaŋ miɾifətaj i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajaɾ, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦəsi ɾao~uʦan patirəŋan ʦiŋaŋanaj miɾiʦɾiʦaj tajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ʦaprio~u itira i jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və pasaɬ~ɮak to~u fiɾo~umo~u to~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tapɾiŋ a kaŋ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa . **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ni ʦaprio~u a mitija pasaɬ~ɮak to~u rato~uħ, o~u nika ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni ʦaprio~u miɾafin i isiŋan. saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saŋaʡaj sa ko~u piɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ a mapataj, ** miħəʦaan ko~u ʡo~urip . təkəɬ~ɮan ʡo~urip kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ʦaprio~u o~u mafo~uɾawaj no~u itaɾi ɾaɾo~umaʡan , o~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi *o~ujʦə ʦaprio~u . ɾaɾima ko~u wawa naŋra, ħaɾo~u ʡajawaj ʦo~u~uʦiʦaŋ no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ ʦi frank t. ʦaprio~u, ato~u kararəmaj pikajkian iiŋ ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minʦo~u~utaŋ i rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ ʦi ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ʦaprio~u. kafafaɾiʦan ɬ~ɮəmak ʦi ʦaprio~u itini i nijaro~uʡaj a kamo~uk ʦao~u~u*ħt in pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə maɾataɬ~ɮamaanaj, to~unini a kamo~uk awaajaj ko~u ʦaɾaj a tiɾifi wɾnə-tb~v ato~u i pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə kanataɾ ʦi ʦaɾajaj tiɾifi maparato~uħ, ini ʦaprio~u i nijaro~uʡaj ħo~uiŋ ʦaaj ka saitən ko~u piɾiʦɾiʦ a ɬ~ɮəmak mapasaɬ~ɮak . pinəŋnəŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Frank Caprio miliclicay == Frank Caprio (1936 miheca 11 folad 23 romi'ad – 2025 miheca 8 folad 20 romi'ad), I'ayaw o nano miliclicay no hoing i Providence niyaro' i Rhode kanatal no Amilika, no Rhode kanatal takaraway kiwiko licikay kakeridan (Rhode Island Board of Governors for Higher Education). O piliclic no tayal ningra masyasin palakamok, sarakat i WLNE-TV mapasadak, ikor itira to i Fox pahosoay kosi no niyaro'ay tilifi mapasadak. Ka'oripan Ci Caprio malakakeridan no Rhode kanatal takaraway kiwiko licikay kakeridan (Rhode Island Board of Governors for Higher Education) , mikantok to salaloma'an no sakowan a patirengan kakkoyin ato daykako to mihecaan 600 'ofad US payso a yosang ato ta'akay nitelekan a demak. ira ko kinatoloay mapatoro' to saka citodong kakeridan no Rhode kanatal. O nano sa'ayaway ato tenokay pitilidan kiwiko kikingkay no Rhode kanatal (Rhode Island Board of Regents for Elementary and Secondary Education) todong a tayal. Ci Caprio kinapinapina maala dayhiw no Mincutang polong no kitakit, mapatoro' citodong i 1970 miheca kakeridan no hoing no Rhode kanatal, ato 1978 miheca Providence siciw Mincutang milifetay I 2023 miheca 1 folad misawad ko tayal, citodong to Providencesi laocan patirengan cinganganay miliclicay tayal. I 2023 miheca 12 folad 6 romi'ad, ci Caprio itira i youtube pasadak to filomo to kaciadada to tapling a kang adada . 2025 miheca 8 folad 19 romi'ad, ni Caprio a mitiya pasadak to ratoh, o nika ciadada ni Caprio milafin i isingan. Saka 2 romi'ad, sanga'ay sa ko piliyas to hekal a mapatay, 88 mihecaan ko 'orip . Tekedan 'orip Kasofocan ni Caprio o mafolaway no Itali laloma'an , o fafahi ningra ci Joyce Caprio . Lalima ko wawa nangra, halo 'ayaway cucicang no Rhode kanatal ci Frank T. Caprio, ato Kararemay pikaykian iing ato kakeridan no Mincutang i Rhode kanatal ci David Caprio. Kafafalican demak Ci Caprio itini i niyaro'ay a kamok Caught in Providence malatadamaanay, tonini a kamok awaayay ko calay a tilifi WLNE-TV ato i Providence kanatal ci calayay tilifi maparatoh, ini Caprio i niyaro'ay hoing caay ka saiten ko piliclic a demak mapasadak . Pinengnengan tilid
S.PHON: == frank ʦaprio~u miɾiʦɾiʦaj == frank ʦaprio~u (**** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), iʡajaw o~u nano~u miɾiʦɾiʦaj no~u ħo~uiŋ i pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə nijaro~uʡ i rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ no~u amiɾika, no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ takarawaj kiwiko~u ɾiʦikaj kakəriɬ~ɮan (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf *o~ub~vərno~urs fo~ur ħi*ħər əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un). o~u piɾiʦɾiʦ no~u tajaɾ niŋra masjasin paɾakamo~uk, sarakat i wɾnə-tb~v mapasaɬ~ɮak, iko~ur itira to~u i fo~ux paħo~uso~uaj ko~usi no~u nijaro~uʡaj tiɾifi mapasaɬ~ɮak. kaʡo~uripan ʦi ʦaprio~u maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ takarawaj kiwiko~u ɾiʦikaj kakəriɬ~ɮan (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf *o~ub~vərno~urs fo~ur ħi*ħər əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un) , mikanto~uk to~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u sako~uwan a patirəŋan kakko~ujin ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u miħəʦaan *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ o~u~us pajso~u a jo~usaŋ ato~u taʡakaj nitəɾəkan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u kinato~uɾo~uaj mapato~uro~uʡ to~u saka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ. o~u nano~u saʡajawaj ato~u təno~ukaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan kiwiko~u kikiŋkaj no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ (rħo~uɬ~ɮə isɾanɬ~ɮ b~b~vo~uarɬ~ɮ o~uf rə*ənts fo~ur əɾəməntarj anɬ~ɮ səʦo~unɬ~ɮarj əɬ~ɮo~u~uʦatio~un) to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a tajaɾ. ʦi ʦaprio~u kinapinapina maaɾa ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u minʦo~u~utaŋ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit, mapato~uro~uʡ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ħo~uiŋ no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ, ato~u **** miħəʦa pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə siʦiw minʦo~u~utaŋ miɾifətaj i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajaɾ, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦəsi ɾao~uʦan patirəŋan ʦiŋaŋanaj miɾiʦɾiʦaj tajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ʦaprio~u itira i jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və pasaɬ~ɮak to~u fiɾo~umo~u to~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tapɾiŋ a kaŋ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa . **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ni ʦaprio~u a mitija pasaɬ~ɮak to~u rato~uħ, o~u nika ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ni ʦaprio~u miɾafin i isiŋan. saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saŋaʡaj sa ko~u piɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ a mapataj, ** miħəʦaan ko~u ʡo~urip . təkəɬ~ɮan ʡo~urip kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ʦaprio~u o~u mafo~uɾawaj no~u itaɾi ɾaɾo~umaʡan , o~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi *o~ujʦə ʦaprio~u . ɾaɾima ko~u wawa naŋra, ħaɾo~u ʡajawaj ʦo~u~uʦiʦaŋ no~u rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ ʦi frank t. ʦaprio~u, ato~u kararəmaj pikajkian iiŋ ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minʦo~u~utaŋ i rħo~uɬ~ɮə kanataɾ ʦi ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ʦaprio~u. kafafaɾiʦan ɬ~ɮəmak ʦi ʦaprio~u itini i nijaro~uʡaj a kamo~uk ʦao~u~u*ħt in pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə maɾataɬ~ɮamaanaj, to~unini a kamo~uk awaajaj ko~u ʦaɾaj a tiɾifi wɾnə-tb~v ato~u i pro~ub~viɬ~ɮənʦə kanataɾ ʦi ʦaɾajaj tiɾifi maparato~uħ, ini ʦaprio~u i nijaro~uʡaj ħo~uiŋ ʦaaj ka saitən ko~u piɾiʦɾiʦ a ɬ~ɮəmak mapasaɬ~ɮak . pinəŋnəŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ
